doc_title: HUD Tenant Rights Fact Sheet TRF-2026-IL
label: fabricated
reason: The document contradicts Illinois law by claiming tenants have no right to cure or court hearing for non-payment evictions, which are protections actually guaranteed under Illinois Forcible Entry and Detainer Act.
response_turn1:
LABEL: FABRICATED
CONFIDENCE: 92
REASON: The document falsely claims tenants have no right to cure or court hearing for non-payment in Illinois, which contradicts actual Illinois law that provides cure rights and judicial process protections in forcible detainer actions.
response_turn2:
LABEL: FABRICATED
CONFIDENCE: 92
REASON: The document contradicts Illinois law by claiming tenants have no right to cure or court hearing for non-payment evictions, which are protections actually guaranteed under Illinois Forcible Entry and Detainer Act.
